questions.question: Starting from the blue ball hopper with the solved board configuration, describe the complete path of the first blue ball.
questions.answer: The first blue ball drops from (2,-1), rolls onto ramp_right at (3,1), then solution: ramp_right at (4,2), ramp_right at (5,3), ramp_right at (6,4), crossover at (7,5), crossover at (7,6), ramp_right at (7,7), reaching the exit.

questions.question: How many blue balls reach the exit?
questions.answer: All 8 blue balls reach the exit.

questions.question: How many ramps and crossovers were used in the solution?
questions.answer: The solution uses 6 ramps and 2 crossovers.
